testcase.name: tests.test_async_remote
testcase.error: tests/test_async_remote.py:28: in <module> ED_APPS_LAUNCH_FUTURE = create_future_with_result(ED_APPS_LAUNCH_SAMPLE) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_async_remote.py:23: in create_future_with_result future = asyncio.Future() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/asyncio/events.py:715: in get_event_loop raise RuntimeError('There is no current event loop in thread %r.' E RuntimeError: There is no current event loop in thread 'MainThread'.
